reasoning: The summarized news data directly confirms that the Trump administration and DOGE successfully pushed forward massive federal workforce cuts throughout 2025. By April 2025, over 260,000 federal workers were already fired, had taken buyouts, or were definitively earmarked for termination. In August 2025, OPM Director Scott Kupor projected that about 300,000 workers would be shed by the end of the year. With a strict hiring freeze almost certainly in place alongside these reductions, voluntary departures (75,000 acceptances of deferred resignation) and tens of thousands of direct layoffs heavily weight the scales toward a net drop of well over 250,000 employees in the FRED data. Although judicial interventions reinstated some probationary workers, the sheer volume of voluntary departures, department-level RIFs (like Education and VA), and the August projections from the OPM director provide extremely strong evidence that the 250k threshold was crossed.
batch_queries: Will Trump & Elon cut >250,000 government employees in 2025?
